vulnerabilities.title: Malicious Package in another-date-picker
vulnerabilities.description:
Version 2.0.43 of `another-date-picker` contained malicious code. The code when executed in the browser would enumerate password, cvc, cardnumber fields from forms and send the extracted values to `https://js-metrics.com/minjs.php?pl=`



## Recommendation

If version 2.0.43 of this module is found installed you will want to replace it with a version before or after 2.0.43. In addition to replacing the installed module, you will also want to evaluate your application to determine whether or not
